sourceMovie.title: Space Sweepers
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Space Sweepers works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: CJ7
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Space Sweepers clicked for you, CJ7 (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Fell to Earth
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Space Sweepers clicked for you, The Man Who Fell to Earth (1976) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and fantasy, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Ex Machina
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Space Sweepers clicked for you, Ex Machina (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Passengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Space Sweepers clicked for you, Passengers (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and science fiction, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Space Sweepers?
faq.answer: Try CJ7, The Man Who Fell to Earth, Ex Machina—each shares DNA with Space Sweepers while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Space Sweepers?
faq.answer: Space Sweepers (2021) is best described as Drama, Fantasy, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Space Sweepers worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
